overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a tropical beach settlement. The character walks from a wooden dock onto sandy beaches, visits the shoreline, and explores a tribal village with thatched structures, market stalls, and NPC villagers.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock walkway with tribal decorations and nautical equipment

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock platform toward the beach area ahead

notable_agents.action: villager bending over working near a large sack on the dock

entered.detail: tall wooden totem with intricate red and green tribal carvings and ornaments
wooden railing with red rope bindings along the dock edge
wooden building with green-trimmed thatched roof and carved pillars
coiled nautical ropes and rigging equipment stacked on the deck
large wooden chest with metal bindings used for storage

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wooden dock platform with a decorated totem pole ahead. The dock features wooden railings with red bindings, thatched roof structures to the left, and nautical equipment like rope coils scattered about. An NPC villager works near a sack on the right side of the dock.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach with ocean shoreline and beached boats

events.description: transitions from wooden dock onto open sandy beach
reaches water's edge and turns right to follow the shoreline

agents.ego_description: walking across the sand toward the ocean, then turning to explore the shoreline and beached boats

entered.detail: white sand covering the ground with footprints and ripples
blue ocean water with gentle waves and distant horizon
small wooden boats with green and red painted hulls pulled onto the sand
large weathered stone rocks along the shoreline edge
tall wooden post with red paper lantern hanging from the top

segments.scene_description: The character steps off the dock onto white sandy beach and walks toward the ocean water. The scene opens to a wide coastal view with blue ocean, beached tribal boats with painted hulls, and rocky outcrops. The character turns right along the shoreline, passing a red lantern post, with the settlement visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal beach settlement with market stalls and communal buildings

events.description: enters the main settlement area with tribal buildings and market activity
approaches large decorated communal building with green pottery ornaments

agents.ego_description: walking through the settlement, passing various NPCs and examining the tribal architecture and market stalls

notable_agents.action: tribal warrior in armor standing guard near a market stall
villager walking through the settlement carrying items

entered.detail: large wooden structure with ornate carvings, thatched roof, and large green pottery vessels displayed on platforms
wooden market stalls with thatched roofs displaying goods and wares
temporary shelters with canvas canopies and wooden poles
tall palm trees scattered throughout the settlement providing shade
large turquoise decorative urns with tribal patterns on wooden stands

segments.scene_description: The character explores the beach settlement, walking past canvas tents and tribal market stalls. A large decorated communal building with green pottery ornaments dominates the center of the settlement. Palm trees provide shade over the sandy paths, and NPC villagers walk about or stand guard. The character continues through the village, passing various wooden structures and ceremonial urns.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a structured wooden dock into a wide coastal expanse and finally into the heart of a tribal beach settlement. It begins by moving along a wooden platform past red-bound railings and nautical equipment, passing a decorated totem pole and a working villager. As the character steps off the dock, the environment opens into a bright white sandy beach where the camera glides toward the blue ocean and passes painted tribal boats and rocky outcrops. The scene then shifts inland along the shoreline past a red lantern post, expanding into a bustling village filled with canvas tents and shaded market stalls. Finally, the movement leads through sandy paths lined with palm trees and ceremonial urns, culminating at a large communal building adorned with green pottery ornaments.
